programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There are less than five days left before the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season - in Gloucester, Massachusetts closes and the competition will come down - to the very last day of fishing

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.sub-title: It All Comes Down To This
programme.desc: It’s the final week of the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season in Gloucester and the competition is so close, it will come down to the very last day of fishing to determine the winner.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: The best fishermen from Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out on the first day of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s week two of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and Erin & Sarah, the father/daughter fishing operation from Portland, Maine, try to keep their lead over the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.sub-title: May the Fish Be with You
programme.desc: It’s week three of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, one captain is forced to choose between two friends on the water.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Midway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season, a long-__running feud lands one Gloucester captain in hot water, while another boat struggles to keep their crew intact.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: At the halfway mark of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season some teams are working well together and killing it while others are floundering and on the verge of killing each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: The Gloucester captains face a familiar decision: whether or not to take the long, high-¬_risk journey to Georges Bank to increase their chances of a big bluefin haul.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: When a violent storm rolls in during week eleven, the Gloucester - captains face a tough decision at a critical time: do they fish… or flee?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There is a narrow margin separating the top four boats and only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.sub-title: The First Fish is the Hardest
programme.desc: Atlantic bluefin tuna have arrived off the coast of Gloucester, Massachusetts, signaling the start of another summer season for the fishermen who count on them for survival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: It’s been a long standing fishing belief that practicing good karma on the ocean brings good in return…but not every captain plays by the rules

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: At the start of week five, the fleet heaps praise on Geordie and Sandro for their five fish catch in the previous week, but Dot Com skipper, Dave, who wasn’t there for it, is having a crisis of confidence. Meanwhile, Paul doubles down on his efforts to train his rookie mate, but his methods might be too much for Rick.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: With updates well underway on custom car guru Joe Martin's prized '65 Pontiac Catalina, Joe and the boys at Martin Bros. Customs give the ol' choppy-doo to a '41 DeSoto that has seen better days.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Truck builds tend to get bigger than originally planned, so it's no surprise when a 1971 Suburban goes even bigger with a custom lifted air suspension and interior; a nearly finished 2006 Kodiak needs just one more custom upgrade.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A simple yet classy Pontiac Tempest arrives for a ground-up build, but things get complicated after the car is completely stripped.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.sub-title: Bel Air Big Block and Street Legal Restomod
programme.desc: A '57 Chevy looks great, but the guys discover that looks can be deceiving.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: This year's over-the-top build has Bill and crew lifting a 2020 Chevy Silverado 5500 more than a foot with a custom heavy-duty air suspension; the guys also prove their Texas mettle by radically overhauling the utility bed.

programme.title: Unique Rides
programme.desc: Team Unique puts the full-court press on basketball superstar Carmelo Anthony's Jeep Wrangler; Will forges a path to build his company's future.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A past client returns with a 1965 Mustang Fastback, and though he likes the stock look, he wants to upgrade the drivetrain, instrumentation and as many modern amenities as possible; the assembly team gets a crash course in engine tuning.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: An active-duty serviceman and his father are finally ready to finish their 1951 Ford pickup.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: The Martins face the challenge of trying to fit a 6'5" former football player into the cab of a 1967 Chevy C10, requiring customization of the firewall, motor, frame and interior.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill and his team make one of their longest custom chassis ever for a new 2020 Denali, and Ekstensive gets a diesel pro-mod drag car back on the track.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.sub-title: Colorado Crawling With Clampy and Maz-Grande
programme.desc: The guys are on the hunt for Colorado's finest four-wheeling trails.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: Dave and Kev take the show to the Midwest, as more than 2,500 cars descend on the Summit Motorsports drag strip for a weekend of fun; Kev gets a ride in a lean, mean drag racing machine; Dave steps up his autocross game.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: With updates well underway on custom car guru Joe Martin's prized '65 Pontiac Catalina, Joe and the boys at Martin Bros. Customs give the ol' choppy-doo to a '41 DeSoto that has seen better days.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Truck builds tend to get bigger than originally planned, so it's no surprise when a 1971 Suburban goes even bigger with a custom lifted air suspension and interior; a nearly finished 2006 Kodiak needs just one more custom upgrade.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: A simple yet classy Pontiac Tempest arrives for a ground-up build, but things get complicated after the car is completely stripped.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The girls bring in a rare Caprice cop car to bolt on a supercharger from a second-generation CTS-V; they'll make brackets for the intercooler, bolt on the supercharger and give the rare cop car some extra power.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The crew diagnoses and fixes some problems on a Dodge Avenger; they demonstrate how to know when motor mounts are bad, and how to easily fix a cracked bumper.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Fuller and Bumpus demonstrate how to take modern design techniques like flush-mounted glass and custom drip rails and convert those elements onto a 1986 Monte Carlo.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Bryan and Jeremy take an F-100 restoration that was supposed to be all original and switch gears; starting with a new Coyote engine and a supercharger under the hood, this project is destined for more custom touches.

programme.title: Super Street Garage
programme.desc: To kick off the show, John "Nads" Naderi and Amir Bentatou hatch a plan to afford their dream Civic Type R hatch, go way over budget and celebrate the dawn of a new era of Super Street the best way they know how: with an old-school canyon run.

programme.title: Super Street Garage
programme.sub-title: Taking a 2015 Subaru BRZ from Fun Commuter to Track-Day Hero
programme.desc: The boys get their hands on a stock Subaru BRZ; Nads and Amir add some affordable mods to turn it into a respectable track car; they try to turn a fast enough time at the track to gain entry into the exclusive sub-two-minute lap club.

programme.title: Super Street Garage
programme.sub-title: Beat Down 350Z Drift Missile to Street Shark Dripping With Style
programme.desc: "Hot Rod Garage" built a Nissan 350Z drifter with a welded differential, hydraulic handbrake, steering angle kit and not much else; then they abandoned it; Nads and Amir try to salvage this one with some much-needed style and a Formula Drift debut.

programme.title: Super Street Garage
programme.sub-title: JDM Toyota Chaser Goes From Big-Body Drifter to Quarter-Mile Dragger
programme.desc: The boys score a Japanese-spec, right-hand-drive 1997 Toyota Chaser; it's the perfect recipe for a sideways, big-body drift car, but Nads and Amir want to go in a different direction: straight down the drag strip.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The team checks off items from a wish list for a military mother's Mustang; many repairs can be performed in a driveway with hand tools.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The girls find some parts for a 1978 Ford Mustang and give new life to the old pony.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou work on their first Dodge Viper, starting with a bolt-on supercharger with long tube headers and exhaust.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The guys diagnose and repair a convertible top on a 1964 Lincoln Continental.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Since a TJ can be had for under 10K, Ian shows how to buy a Jeep on a budget and outfit it with everything needed to hit the rocks and still have money left over.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: The Budget TJ gets some more parts; Ian updates the suspension with new coilovers; he adds new bumpers front and rear, and by the end of the day, this TJ is trail ready.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Cars die of boredom, so it wasn't great for a Plymouth Prowler to sit in a museum for 15 years; the girls show what areas to fix before the car gets back on the road.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: The team brings back the 442 Tribute car to give it a new LS engine and finish modifying the interior for the previously-installed TKO transmission.

programme.desc: Slyk Wagner Brown vs Stefano, Nosawa vs Blitz vs Cyrus vs Tommy Diablo, April Hunter vs La Tigessa, Homicide vs Chicano

programme.desc: Bob Luce and Guest Moose Cholak host. Calhoun & Cholak vs Rashke & Schmidt, Billy Robinson vs The Big K, Bastien & Cortez vs Rashke & Schmidt, Crusher & Bastien vs Bockwinkel & Stevens

programme.title: Bob Luce's Hall of Fame Classics
programme.desc: Ivan Koloff vs. Cowboy Ellis, Valiant & Rashke vs Snyder & Robinson, Showstoppers with Bobby Heenan, Dick the Bruiser vs Ernie ladd & More! Hosted by Bob Luce with guests Moose Cholak & Dick the Bruiser

programme.title: TNA Lockdown 2010
programme.desc: April 18, 2010. Team Hogan vs. Team Flair in a Lethal Lockdown match, plus AJ Styles vs. D'Angelo Dinero for the TNA World Heavyweight Championship and an iconic Kurt Angle vs. Mr Anderson encounter from Saint Charles, MO.

programme.title: TNA Lockdown 2011
programme.desc: April 17, 2011. Features Sting vs. Rob Van Dam vs. Mr. Anderson in a steel cage match for the TNA World Heavyweight Championship, plus Ric Flair returns to the ring as Immortal face Fortune inside Lethal Lockdown from Cincinnati, OH.

programme.desc: April 18, 2010. Team Hogan vs. Team Flair in a Lethal Lockdown match, plus AJ Styles vs. D'Angelo Dinero for the TNA World Heavyweight Championship and an iconic Kurt Angle vs. Mr Anderson encounter from Saint Charles, MO.

programme.desc: April 17, 2011. Features Sting vs. Rob Van Dam vs. Mr. Anderson in a steel cage match for the TNA World Heavyweight Championship, plus Ric Flair returns to the ring as Immortal face Fortune inside Lethal Lockdown from Cincinnati, OH.

programme.title: IMPACT! Wrestling - June 2, 2020
programme.desc: The Finals of the World Championship No. 1 contender tournament headlines this week’s edition of IMPACT!, as Ace Austin squares off against Trey. Plus more!

programme.title: IMPACT! Wrestling - June 9, 2020
programme.desc: The road to Slammiversary 2020 begins on this week’s edition of IMPACT! from Nashville, as an announcement will be made about the future of the IMPACT World Championship. Taya Valkyrie challenges Jordynne Grace for the Knockouts Title. Plus more!

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: The guys get invited to take part in some dirt track racing with Kenny Shrader. No better way to learn more about your suspension and ride than to push a car to its limits with the help from Moog Steering and Suspension.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Increasing the tire size on your lifted truck might give you better gas mileage, but you end up losing performance. Kevin and Willie show you how gears and tire sizes relate and how to get your power back to the ground.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Want to supercharge your Mustang? Kevin and Willie take a look at the new offering from Pro Charger.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: The guys get a new diagnostic tool in the shop and find a very challenging test for it.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Tri-5 Chevy gets a new exhaust, but only after the guys fix the modified cross-member that just wasn’t cooperating.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Willie B goes on location to experience a two day build school for a Factory Five Roadster.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.sub-title: Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “The Century Race”: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “A Motorcycle Crime Story”: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “Yes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harley”: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: The natural landscape of Jekyll Island, GA makes for a great backdrop to showcase the country’s greatest cars. But the ocean air and remoteness of this GA barrier island is no place to leave a painstakingly rebuilt ‘59 Imperial Speedster. Host Skip Smith makes it his mission to locate the talented builder behind this island mystery. Guest host Totem joins Bryan Fuller in the C&O lots to pick out his favorites.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Imagination, ingenuity, and heartache join friends who set out with a simple goal of transforming a ‘35 Plymouth into a running taxi cab. Provenance and passion take center stage as families and friends strive for best in show. Host Rickey Gadson checks out perfect replicas of the original Shelby Cobras and takes Skip and Bryan on ‘borrowed’ taxi ride.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Call the Peach State Challengers a “car club” and you will quickly be corrected. The defenders of everything Dodge are “family” and they make no excuses for their loyalty to brand and brother. Spend a day at the track with these Challengers and find out what their version of the family photo looks like.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Former Jet Ski Champion Ryan Hardwick has succeeded in everything he’s touched in racing and business, so why not race Lamborghinis! Hardwick has found rapid success with his high tech training methods; he shares his secrets with host Rickey Gadson in this episode of C&O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Daimlers and Morgans, and Citroens, oh my! Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation grows stronger as Bob Boston’s collection, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattles into an event; guest host Katherine Legge explains the competitor to her racing sponsor Acura, Porsche.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Early spring in Jekyll Island, GA is something to behold. Add a few hundred of the country’s coolest rides for Caffeine & Octane at the Beach, and it’s a thing of beauty. Models that blasted the glass ceiling of expectation at the all makes and models show include a hand-built, twin-turbo Tucker, a one-off 1951 Kaiser Drag’N, and a Roadkill Custom known only as Blasphemi!

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane is back at the beach on Jekyll Island with a focus on cars and families. Fathers & sons, with their barn-find Pilot House trucks and Plymouth Satellites, call cars the glue that keeps them bonded together with C&O being the best place to show them off.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: On this edition of Caffeine & Octane, we’ll go inside the head of Master Builder Bryan Fuller at the SEMA car show, the largest annual trade show in the country; SEMA always brings out the best in the automotive industry. From a jaw dropping Javelin to a multimillion-dollar Pagani, Brian will prove to you, what happens in Vegas, doesn’t always stay in Vegas! Ryan Hardwick guest hosts and ventures deep into the C&O lots to find his favorite ride of the day.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Take apart and assemble a motor in less than 30 minutes? Sure, NASCAR pit crews can make the claim, but can a rag tag group of kids with names like Jelly Donut, Butter Bean, and Wonder Woman claim the pit fame? Host Rickey Gadson heads to the Sims Academy to settle a bet. This ultra fast half-hour edition of Caffeine & Octane also includes a builder’s take on an Ultra Four Unlimited Off-Road Racer; Ryan Hardwick joins the gang at Caffeine and Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Demetrio Montalvo likes American music, American food, and especially American cars. Only one problem - Demetrio lives in Cuba. A Visa, bestowed to him from some American friends in high places, lets him travel to the States to search for tough to find automotive parts and attend his favorite car show. Showing up to Caffeine & Octane in a cool caddy is the easy part. Picking parts to take back home presents a unique set of challenges for the Cuban car builder; Formula Drift racer Federico Sceriffo brings the first ever Formula Drift Ferrari to C&O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Porsche collector, customizer, and Urban Outlaw, Magnus Walker is a world-wide rock star to fans of the German car company. So, when Caffeine & Octane producers invited him to travel cross country to tell the story of a hidden Porsche collection tangled in a North Georgia Vineyard, they were surprised when he signed on. No sour grapes here, what Walker found at the Wolf Mountain Winery will impress even those with the most refined palette for Porsches.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: A Hall of Famer?s search for an Exotic Car that fits; a blind man?s ?touchy feely? approach to seeing great cars.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Back to the future with a Majestic build from Fuller Moto that showcases 3-D printed parts, an electric motor, and hub-centric steering.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Horsepower and million-dollar sticker shock, from two and four wheels, dominate this edition of C & O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
programme.desc: A need for speed in a Sleepy Georgia town has engineers pushing the boundaries to exceed 3000 horsepower.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
programme.desc: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
programme.desc: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
programme.desc: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
programme.desc: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
programme.desc: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
programme.desc: Mecum Auction's push for a $15,000,000 sale.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
programme.desc: Doubling down for cars and coffee.

programme.title: Helping Hands Garage
programme.desc: This '73 Dodge Charger was pushed aside when the Barron family’s oldest daughter passed away. Now the family is ready to charge ahead and get the car running again in Kaitlyn’s honor.

programme.title: Helping Hands Garage
programme.desc: Katie, Collete and the Helping Hands team up with non-profit organization “Wheels of Success” to restore an Acura to provide to a hardworking single mom. The Helping Hands team will make sure "Gray Bay Bay" can stay on the road for another 100k miles.

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen meet an irate young man parked illegally then swing over to get a mom out of a predicament. All in a days work!

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen have a day with a few folks after taking their cars to impound.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: An family farm in the mid-west contains houses, barns, outbuildings, trailers, grain silos and buses full of old stuff and perhaps the biggest stash of undiscovered old motorcycles in the country. The collection was put together by their unnamed father. Seller agrees to have Dale broker rare Excelsior for high-end client. Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: Mera Muqaddar
programme.desc: Suraj leaves Shanti and their newborn baby. He gets married to Ruchi, who also gives birth to a boy. When the boys grow up, they fight with each other without knowing the truth.

programme.title: Paayal
programme.desc: Shantidevi's daughter elopes with a city-bred man when Shantidevi refuses to give consent to their marriage. Years later, a man meets Shantidevi to inform her that her daughter and son-in-law have died, leaving behind their daughter named Paayal.

programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
programme.desc: Rahul is heavily indebted and has to bring up his two notorious nephews and a niece. One day, the kids go to a carnival and befriend a runaway bride. Trouble ensues when they decide to help her by bringing her home and keep her out of Rahul's sight.

programme.title: Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya
programme.desc: Samir, a handsome orthopaedic surgeon, lies about being married, to keep the women falling for him at bay. However, when he meets and falls in love with Sonia, he is forced to conjure up a wife and fake a divorce, in order to marry her.

programme.title: Luck

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount. Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the world's most bumbling guards, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner, and Lou, Froy, and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughter's aid on another job.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this no-holds-barred season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member. Sonia and Lyndah head out with Ashley to repossess a hang-glider in what might turn out to be the last job the three do together, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah confront a team of shady astronomers who don't want to give up their van, and when Froy, Matt, and Sonia take on a risky job on the bad side of town, bullets fly, and the life of one of the team hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer, but there's a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movie's star have a checkered history, Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast, and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle. Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle, but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack. Plus, a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car, and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets. Sonia and Froy's repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife, and when Lou and Sonia can't locate their target car, Lou comes up with a master plan that requires some back-up

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Donovan Wisse (20-1, 10 KO) puts his middleweight championship on the line against number one contender Ulric Bokeme (32-4, 17 KO) in the main event of the evening. Wisse is one of the top P4P kickboxers on the planet today and is chasing his fourth straight title defense. After his Grand Prix heroics, the number one ranked heavyweight Levi Rigters (17-2, 8 KO) returns to action to take on dangerous late notice replacement Nico Pereira Horta (22-8, 3 KO) in the co-main event. The ‘King of The Hague’ crown is up for grabs when rivals Michael Boapeah (16-4-1, 7 KO) and Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-9, 36 KO) clash. The two top middleweights meet in this local derby match-up where the winner walks away with bragging rights in a fight that is sure to split the arena.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A couple is taken into custody for lewd and indecent exposure. An intoxicated woman believes that she is being treated unfairly, and a man with an existing wrap sheet is busted.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A cell brawl escalates quickly. After being arrested on her wedding night, a woman has deep regrets and serious reflection. Officers free a man from his own noose and place him on a vigilant watch.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An aspiring martial-arts fighter tries to wriggle out of handcuffs and gets stuck. A football rivalry takes a bad turn when a Steelers fan assaults a Ravens fan.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Inmates are subdued after exhibiting unruly behavior. Anger drives emotions as a man accuses officers of racial profiling. An officer uses “verbal judo” to gain the upper hand with combative inmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Reno, NV an intoxicated man is placed in isolation after exhibiting combative behavior. In Portland, OR a man wearing a red dress is brought in for trespassing and tells officers that he is in the FBI. In Reno, NV two young men are set straight after stealing a car.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man believes he is an alien wrongfully arrested for obstruction. Claiming to be a law school student, a man just doesn’t understand why he was arrested for trespassing. A woman claims she swallowed her friend’s pills for good reason. A family reunion ends with a bruised and bloodied husband.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Chaos surrounds a routine medical screening of an inmate. In the prison phone center, a smoking pipe is discovered and a mystery ensues. A pregnant woman is investigated over potential sex crimes.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the “international police”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman refuses to wear jail-issued clothing. A man tells his tearful tale to officers, and a chatty inebriated woman is placed in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In San Diego, CA an officer grapples with a combative detainee. In Portland, OR six party goers are taken into custody. In Fort Worth, TX a high-risk inmate manages to get the key to his handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated woman clashes with officers but later shows that good behavior pays off. An experienced prostitute gives solid advice to a younger woman and begs her to get out of the “game.” An angry woman smashes her cheating boyfriend’s windshield.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is sent to intake for indecent exposure. In Spokane, WA a man threatening bodily harm to himself is placed in a restraining chair. In Salt Lake City, UT an intoxicated woman fades in and out of coherency. In Portland, OR an amputee is detained for dodging the subway toll.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man in detention is paranoid about officers handling him inappropriately. A man in custody claims to have a seizure. A man is taken in to custody for stealing videogaming equipment.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated man tests officers' patience. A woman tries to deceive police with multiple identities. A one-legged biker shows off his balancing skills to officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two men are found fighting on security cameras. Meanwhile, an impromptu tattoo jail parlor is discovered and shut down. Later, a Russian man and his mysterious friend are excited to be in a U.S. jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers fear a man may attempt to hang himself and decide to intervene. A heavily injured man ends up in jail after taking cocaine and acid. Irascibility shadows a man with low blood sugar.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two agitated inmates are put in restraints to cool down. A suspected burglar expresses concern over a milk allergy, and an inmate becomes upset about the care given to her belongings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a lewd woman is jailed. In Las Vegas, NV a man is placed in the restraining chair after attempting to bite his own fingers off. In Portland, OR a man is brought in for possession. In Sarasota, FL a homeless man is brought in for trespassing and battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT an inebriated man gets aggressive and questions why he's in custody. In Sarasota, FL a couple are taken in for assaulting a bartender. In Portland, OR a man is placed in custody for harassing movie theater security guards. In Las Vegas, NV a chauffeur is placed in custody for amassing a number of of moving violations.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: One man booked for intoxication is placed in a sobering cell for being uncooperative. An aggrieved woman claims Animal Control took her “baby.” A man tells officers he is a “child of God” and actor.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman booked for domestic violence begins screaming and can’t calm down. Two friends arrested for public intoxication embrace in a tearful reunion. Later, a woman is brought in with a stolen car.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man tries to swallow his ring. A heroin addict wants help when he realizes his habit has cost him everything he loves. One man fights with his girlfriend in a bathroom, another fights with his girlfriend at home, both are surprised they are arrested for domestic violence. A habitual criminal is worried that other inmates will fight over him.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A violent ruckus ensues after a man is placed in jail. Secret prison communication methods are explored and examined. Later, deputies cautiously extract a disruptive man while his wife is held nearby.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A secret stash is uncovered during a search at a suspect's property. Two rowdy inmates don't quite hit it off when they invade each other's personal space, and a jaywalker experiences problems keeping his pants from falling down.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a combative inmate provokes the use of pepper spray. In Sarasota, FL a drunk woman is uncooperative during processing. In Spokane, WA a man attempts to flip off the camera while taking his mug-shot.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A prostitute gets busted on a slow work day. An intoxicated inmate tangles with guards, and an angry woman has cross words for a guard.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: To avoid self-harm, an intoxicated man is handcuffed to a booking bench. After fighting at a bar, a combative prisoner is arrested. Also, an unmarried couple squabbles during the booking process.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An agitated man is overly concerned about his 30K watch. cries when he has blood drawn. An inebriated woman threatens her arresting officers with bodily harm, and a woman has no recollection of her arrest.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman finds herself in jail after telling police she was frightened by a monkey mask. An intoxicate man feels an officer is very special. During a search, an officer finds contraband in a pack of cigarettes that has big consequences to an inmate. A young man says his mom tried to pepper spray him over his brother’s drug use while officers discover the truth to his arrest.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody. A dad gets busted for DUI while on his way to pick up a pizza for his kids. Officers recover drugs from a suspect’s pocket who is puzzled as to how they got there. A woman learns the hard way “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas”.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Tempers flare up when two agitated inmates share a cell. An intoxicated woman gives officers a hard time in booking, and a hustler facing DUI charges wants to change his ways.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man is charged with possession of an illegal substance. Police arrest a woman for narcotics, and a couple is caught passing a fake prescription.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A fight involving female detainees breaks out after one woman accuses the other of staring at her. A man is arrested for shattering the hotel glass door as a result of a fight. An old crooner believes that rap stars are going to bail him out of jail. Handcuffs don’t stop a woman from trying to flirt with an officer.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Over the course of a single shift, officers are forced to go toe to toe with a hotheaded inmate refusing to change cells without a fight and then must deal with the whims of a homeless man who demands room service and an upgraded jail cell.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A jail chaplain counsels a sad inmate. An intoxicated woman demands to talk to the Canadian Embassy.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a belligerent woman is restrained. In Portland, OR a repeat offender is placed in isolation for unruly behavior. In Las Vegas, NV a man opens up about how his friends and family feel about him in a holding cell. In Spokane, WA a man is jailed in an attempt to steal coffee for his friends.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. In Spokane, WA a homeless man is brought in for assault. In Salt Lake City, UT a frequent visitor is brought in for threating the security staff at a local bar with a firearm.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A disorderly man shouts to the heavens and asks for divine intervention. Twin brothers are arrested after a fray with police. A man in women’s clothing is booked after harassing passengers on a bus.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers find hidden drugs on a burglary suspect during a pat down that leads to a tense confrontation. A beer sets off a fight between a mom and her daughter causing one family member to end up in jail. A rare event takes place in the county jail - a woman arrested for a warrant is in a good mood. Punching a pit bull while drunk lands in man in jail where he comes face to face with a childhood hero.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV a man who insists he paid for a speeding ticket becomes so incensed that he is placed in a restraining chair. In Sarasota, FL a belligerent man accuses officers of touching him inappropriately. In Portland, OR officers help a young mother and her kids.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a truculent man is sent to the drunk-tank to sober up. In Portland, OR a drunk woman is jailed for attacking a child. In Sarasota, FL an intoxicated man has difficulty recalling why he's been arrested. In Spokane, WA a man "borrows" a car to curb his drug habit.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers transfer an over caffeinated suspect to isolation so he can unwind. A man arrested for DUI while doing donuts in a mall parking lot asserts he was robbed. A jaywalking Utah man claims someone hit him on the head. A disgruntled detainee lands a sucker punch on a fellow inmate.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate's flirting calms a jailhouse fight. An inebriated man tries to avoid his eighth DUI by claiming his car was stolen, and a disagreement over Faecbook puts a couple in jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man admits to urinating in public. A couple spends their date night in jail after being over served, and a DUI suspect passes out during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman fights arrest resulting in a trip to the isolation chamber. One inmate calls 911 within jail walls causing confusion. Later, officers run to the rescue when a man passes out.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man learns it’s never a good idea to light up a joint next to an active crime scene. An officer encourages a young drug addicted couple to seek treatment. Luck runs out for a tutu-wearing prostitute, and officers pick up an at-risk kid for their 93rd time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man under the influence states money will buy his freedom after threatening police with a gun. Individuals arrested for possession blame each other. A man arrested for drunk driving becomes unruly.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL an unruly detainee is sent to isolation, twice. In Multnomah county a young man feverishly waits for his release. In Portland, OR a man is jailed for bitting his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is placed in isolation after disparaging other inmates. Alarms blare while a fight erupts in the shower room among inmates. A man booked into jail is revealed to have a 20-year arrest record.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers warn a man that dressing up like a clown in Texas is not a good idea. A shotgun is found in the hoodie of a man arrested for riding his bicycle without a headlight. A young couple wonders how pot ended up in their possession. Officers are surprised at the amazing amount of pot one can smoke.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies deal with chaos after volatile inmates begin fighting. Accusations of deceit plague a booking as a woman is arrested for drunk driving. Prisoners are restrained after causing a commotion.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated man thinks the doctors are CIA agents. A homeless karate practitioner's actions land him in an isolated cell, and a Canadian man with no pants wants to arm wrestle.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Three inmates start brawling inside the drunk tank. One man must wear a mask so that officers can avoid his rain of spit. A young woman fails to take jail seriously and behaves provocatively.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. A woman finds that trying to drink away a bad boyfriend and then asking the boyfriend for bail money is not a good idea. A man collapses during booking after being arrested for drunk driving. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After cutting her head, a woman bites and kicks deputies. To investigate potential hidden meanings, a man’s tattoos are examined. A confused man is found with illegal mushrooms at a bus stop.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Booze and a cellphone dispute lead one man to the “green suit.” A couple of panhandlers profess their undying love to each other. Alcohol pushes a proud father across the line. A homeless woman gives officers career advice.

programme.title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.sub-title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.desc: Almost halfway through the 2024 F1 calendar, Formula 1 teams have been busy upgrading their cars, trying to beat Red Bull to the podium's top step. But what are the biggest changes on the grid so far? From Mercedes' novel front wing concept to McLaren's sidepods, Ferrari's engine cover to Red Bull's rear wing, Jake Boxall-Legge channels his inner Bob Ross to illustrate over photos the most interesting and noteworthy upgrades of the season pre-Spanish Grand Prix.

programme.title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down
programme.sub-title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down

But were the track limit rulings fair, or should more penalties have been issued? Bryn Lucas chats with Alex Kalinauckas and Filip Cleeren to discuss the McLaren x Red Bull controversy, Russell's ability to grab the win and more.
