programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks is your go-to destination for MMA and Fighter action!

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Christmas In New York
programme.desc: In the vein of Love Actually, the story follows six different couples in a posh Manhattan hotel over the course of one night just before Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: With the threat of having to close her father's candy store, Wendy and her six-year-old daughter Grace travel to the big city in hopes of making extra holiday cash to save the store.

programme.title: The Merry In-laws
programme.desc: After Alex gets engaged to Peter, she goes to meet his parents for the first time, not knowing they are actually Santa and Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus' only daughter wants to experience the "real world" before she must marry the son of Jack Frost, a boy she has never met, and take over the family business. Along with her trusty elf, Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her magic powers and famous father a secret. At school Cassie is pursued by two boys: Sam, sweetly awkward and J.R., handsome and wealthy. As her impending arranged marriage looms, Cassie struggles with her feelings for Sam and her obligation to her father and Christmas.

programme.title: Cupid's Christmas
programme.desc: As Santa Claus searches for his lost Reindeer the love story of Katie Luke is re-ignited.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: Traumatized by her past Christmas is not at the top of Sarahs list this time of year. However, waltzing through lifes unexpected emergencies, she is taught the Christmas dance.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: Holiday Breakup VOD

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Holiday Engagement

programme.title: Christmas Crush
programme.desc: Christmas Crush VOD

programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, 'Game of Thrones') and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London Mitchell who is known as a Scrooge has previously lived an unscrupulous lifestyle, by divorcing his wife, barely seeing his children, and dumping a woman a month before Christmas to be with somebody else.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman who comes from a life of privilege falls for the owner of a soup kitchen after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his seven year old daughter.

programme.title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
programme.desc: Returning from the civil war Jim Slade discovers his parents dead at their farm. It is said that the gang under the lead of Corbett has committed the crime. Jim now goes for revenge but things turn out to be more complicated than he originally thought. To get some money he accepts the job as a sheriff.

programme.title: The Long Hair of Death
programme.desc: At the end of the 15th century, a woman is condemned to death because she is considered the murderer of the reigning duke. At the stake, amidst excruciating suffering, she casts her curse on those who condemned her to death and on those present, who are thrilled by the execution. Her curse brings her back from the dead.

programme.title: Safari express
programme.desc: Two safari tour-guides and business partners find in the African jungle a wandering stunning blonde who suffers from amnesia.

programme.title: Crime Busters
programme.desc: An attempted robbery turns to be an unexpected recruitment when two unemployed men mistakenly break into a police office instead of a store.

programme.title: White Apache
programme.desc: Outlaws attack a band of settlers and kill everyone except a pregnant woman who's rescued by a band of Indians. The woman dies giving birth but Chief White Bear adopts her male baby, naming him "Shining Sky," and raising him as brother to his own son, Black Wolf.

programme.title: Ben and Charlie
programme.desc: The pair of small-time hustlers settle in a town with the intention of conning the locals out of their money. This time, however, the duo will end up outsmarting themselves.

programme.title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
programme.desc: Returning from the civil war Jim Slade discovers his parents dead at their farm. It is said that the gang under the lead of Corbett has committed the crime. Jim now goes for revenge but things turn out to be more complicated than he originally thought. To get some money he accepts the job as a sheriff.

programme.title: The Long Hair of Death
programme.desc: At the end of the 15th century, a woman is condemned to death because she is considered the murderer of the reigning duke. At the stake, amidst excruciating suffering, she casts her curse on those who condemned her to death and on those present, who are thrilled by the execution. Her curse brings her back from the dead.

programme.title: Safari express
programme.desc: Two safari tour-guides and business partners find in the African jungle a wandering stunning blonde who suffers from amnesia.

programme.title: Thieves and Robbers
programme.desc: A playboy who makes a living out of seducing women and stealing their jewellery accidentally witnesses a Mafia murder. He must work together with the man who is constantly trying to catch him, Lt. Alan Parker, in order to save his life.

programme.title: Tough Lover
programme.desc: Peppino, an Italian in Brazil, works in his cousin Carlo's company, which is close to bankruptcy. Only a German businessman, Lacter, could save the company, so Peppino pays a prostitute to seduce Lacter by pretending to be Lucia, Carlo's wife. But the German has actually already met Lucia, starting a hilarious whirlwind of misunderstandings.

programme.title: My Name Is Rocco Papaleo
programme.desc: Rocco Papaleo, an optimistic and kind man from a mining town in Alaska, gets away from his company during a trip to Chicago and is increasingly disillusioned in the face of the city's hostility.

programme.title: Iron Warrior
programme.desc: Ator and his brother are separated as children by the evil witch Phaedra. 18 years later she takes over the kingdom with the help of a masked warrior. Ator and Princess Janna prepare for the final fight.

programme.title: Stronger by Stress
programme.desc: Worlds top experts talks about leveraging the science of stress adaptation and biohacking to become more resilient in our everyday lives.

programme.title: Fireline
programme.desc: The spectacle of a California megafire, with firefighting teams struggling to save their lives and anything they can.

programme.title: Yung Punx: A Punk Parable
programme.desc: Four little misfits from working-class Massachusetts cope with the highs and lows of punk rock stardom. SNL/Rick and Morty's Chris Parnell narrates.

programme.title: Catching Air
programme.desc: "Catching Air" is a documentary showcasing diverse air guitarists, defying stereotypes and inspiring hidden talents.

programme.title: The Food Cure
programme.desc: Six advanced cancer patients make an unusual choice. They decide to face the disease with their forks. The patients embark on an arduous 7-year journey as they attempt to eat and juice their way back to health...with surprising results.

programme.title: Eating you Alive
programme.desc: eating You Alive addresses why 30.4 million people die each year and provides evidence based science, expert testimony and inspirational stories of disease reversal and a discovery that can cure our top killer diseases.

programme.title: First Responders In Crisis
programme.desc: A documentary about the mental health struggles of first responders, through the lens of a small town in New England.

programme.title: Closed for Storm
programme.desc: Closed For Storm is a film detailing the incredible history of a massive, American theme park that was eventually left completely abandoned

programme.title: Stranger Fruit
programme.desc: What really happened on August 9th, 2014 in Ferguson, Missouri? That afternoon, Officer Darren Wilson killed 18-year-old Michael Brown. 'Stranger Fruit' is the unraveling of what took place, told through the eyes of Mike Brown's family.

programme.title: Entangled
programme.desc: A collision between one of the most endangered species, North America’s most valuable fishery, and a federal agency mandated to protect both.

programme.title: The Lake at the Bottom of the World
programme.desc: Scientists venture into the virtually unknown interior of Antarctica to explore a lake buried 3,600 feet beneath.

programme.title: Wild Beauty Mustang Spirit of the West
programme.desc: An immersive journey into the world of wild horses that illuminates the profound beauty and plight they face in the USA.

programme.title: Conception
programme.desc: Vic and Ami are living the perfect married life, but their world turns upside down when they attempt to start a family.

programme.title: Downwind
programme.desc: Hiroshima. Nagasaki. Mercury, Nevada? The latter was the site for the testing of 928 nuclear weapons from 1951 to 1992.

programme.title: Hot Water on Long Island
programme.desc: About the toxins that exist within the groundwater and aquifer that supplies the drinking water for all of Long Island.

programme.title: District 8D!
programme.desc: The District literally, Eightdistrict is an animated ghetto film. It takes place in Budapest's notorious District Eight, the local Harlem, home to a relatively large gypsy and immigrant population and a center of East European prostitution, populated by the urban, post-socialist ghetto's stereotypical characters, ghetto stereotypes: a white-trash pimp and the group of prostitutes he manages; an accented Chinese restaurantowner and his teenage son, who is obsessed with martial arts; an alcoholic but charming, Jewish plastic surgeon and his geeky son; members of the Ukrainian mafia; corrupt and dumb policemen; and, most prominently, members of an extended gypsy family.

programme.title: Dog Men
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant future only a few homo sapiens are left. Struggling for survival they are forced to live from hunting the last remaining animals in the peripheral ruins of an advanced human civilization. But they are unaware of being stalked themselves by a mysterious scanner. A science-fiction story about hunting and being hunted, about extinction and survival, about dogs - and men.

programme.title: Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A Series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: Don't Fade Away
programme.desc: Life was easy for Jackson White (RYAN KWANTEN). With looks, brains, and athletic ability, the possibilities seemed endless. But when he came to New York City to pursue a career in the music industry, he was so seduced by money and status that he lost track of who he was. Now, with both his personal and professional lives on the brink of disaster, he retreats home to care for his dying father (BEAU BRIDGES). While in North Carolina, he confronts the friends he lost track of and the girl he left behind (MISCHA BARTON).

programme.title: Early Summer
programme.desc: A family chooses a match for their daughter Noriko, but she, surprisingly, has her own plans.

programme.title: Eli Eli
programme.desc: An elderly couple, Mendel and Hannah Shapiro, need to raise money to hang onto their farm and turn to their adult children for help.

programme.title: Eternally Yours
programme.desc: Anita Halstead, swept off her feet by magician Arturo, finds the results less than magical.

programme.title: Fall Down Dead
programme.desc: A metropolitan city is in the grip of fear when rolling blackouts bring out a serial killer dubbed The Picasso Killer...

programme.title: Faust
programme.desc: The demon Mephisto wagers with God that he can corrupt a mortal man's soul.

programme.title: Flying Lessons
programme.desc: With her life at a crossroads, 25 year old Sophie Conway (MAGGIE GRACE) returns to the small town she always tried to forget. Once home, she’s faced with past lovers, a tangled relationship with her Mother, and Harry Pleasant, an Alzheimer's patient who in quite an opposite fashion, shares in Sophie’s struggle to remember.

programme.title: Frame Of Mind
programme.desc: Desperately seeking a new start, NYPD Detective, David Secca (CARL T. EVANS) and his pregnant wife escape the struggles of New York City and return to their hometown in New Jersey. He reluctantly takes a job with the local Police Department. His priorities abruptly change when he stumbles upon a mysterious strip of 8mm film, discovered accidently in an antique jewelry box. Things really heat up as it becomes obvious that he found a key piece of evidence in the Kennedy assassination.

programme.title: Gung Ho!
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island.

programme.title: Harvest, The
programme.desc: Thousands of foreign workers support today the most known Italian excellence: agri-food production. A docu-musical shows their daily exploitation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose!
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal, Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn’t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he wants, you can’t help being sucked in by Moose’s relentless optimism and zest for life.

programme.title: Discover Real Lives
programme.desc: A documentary on Brigitte Bardot and an insight into the Apatani women in these short documentaries on beauty.

programme.title: Morning Giggles
programme.desc: Laugh out loud as two insects help a caterpillar in her metamorphosis and much more in this collection of funny animated short films.

programme.title: Kids Breakfast Box
programme.desc: A small grain of corn dreams of fame and fortune and an apprentice trains as a sorcerer in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Adventures with Dennis & Gnasher as Dennis comes up with his own martial art and the gang decide to build a swimming pool.

programme.title: LOL Family Comedy
programme.desc: Spencer just wants to talk to someone at his bank and a large jelly causes complications in this collection of family short comedy films.

programme.title: Pick n' Mix
programme.desc: A young tennis player is pushed to breaking point by his father and Vicky meets Sam in this collection of family drama short films.

programme.title: Celebrity Mix
programme.desc: Alan Rickman stars in Dust and Benedict Cumberbatch stars in Inseparable in this collection of star studded short films.

programme.title: Award Winning Drama
programme.desc: Eddie Marsan stars in powerful drama Man and Boy and 11 year old Viola tries to process her grief after her brother's death in this collection of short dramas.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: Four boys get more than they bargained for when one of them is bitten by a snake and a struggling actor in LA finally loses it in this collection of short action thrillers.

programme.title: Into the Abyss
programme.desc: Two strangers survive a nuclear explosion and a dystopian future sees the rise of the machines in this collection of science fiction short films.

programme.title: Night Terrors
programme.desc: A bereaved mother makes a terrible choice and two friends search for an abducted girl in this chilling collection of horror short films.

programme.title: Late Night Animation
programme.desc: Richard E. Grant narrates Teeth and two toads take a tour of a deserted mansion unaware of its sinister past, plus much more in this collection of late night animation.

programme.title: Discover True Stories
programme.desc: A powerful documentary exploring inmate Dwayne Stafford's assault on a white supremacist in this collection of short documentaries.

programme.title: Ugly Laugh Adult Comedy
programme.desc: When a clay pigeon shoot goes wrong, three friends find themselves lost in the Scottish Moorlands, plus much more in these short comedies.

programme.title: Coffee n' Culture
programme.desc: An artist who specialises in minatures and a cinema in Japan kept alive by the passion of one man feature in this collection of short documentaries with a focus on the arts.

programme.title: Hana's Helpline
programme.desc: Animation fun now as a duck agony aunt and her duckling son help animals who need emotional support, including Olivia the octopus and Leo the lion cub.

programme.title: Kids Breakfast Box
programme.desc: Harvesting the moon's milk is just one of the adventures in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Jim Jams n' Toast
programme.desc: A boy's obsession with hedgehogs and finding your favourite childhood hill to sledge on feature in this gentle collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: The adventures of Mogu & Perol and Toki & Dewai and many others in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Discover Real Lives
programme.desc: Meet female pro boxer Heather Hardy, and four climbers come together in one of Jordan's national parks in just two of the stories in this collection of sport themed short documentaries.

programme.title: Discover Real Lives
programme.desc: A focus on animals now as we look at life as a snake catcher and the animals that live on the Sub Antarctica Islands in these real life short documentaries. .

programme.title: Feet Up Drama
programme.desc: A three part special about reconnecting during lockdown and more in this collection of drama films.

programme.title: Up With Baby
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Mogu & Perol and visit the Imaginary Friend Shop in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose!
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal, Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn’t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he wants, you can’t help being sucked in by Moose’s relentless optimism and zest for life.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A New Life In Hollywood
programme.desc: Ever since the former Duke and Duchess of Sussex left royal life for Los Angeles tension has mounted between the two households.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Price Of Freedom
programme.desc: On January 8th 2020 The Duke and Duchess of Sussex made a shocking announcement that sent ripples around the world... they were leaving the Royal Family. To many this sudden headline came as an overwhelming surprise– but to a lot of devoted royal watchers the signs have been there for a long time. It seems as though Harry and Meghan have just decided that the time and place.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Became Three
programme.desc: Relive the magic of one of the most memorable weddings in history- the marriage of Prince Harry & Meghan Markle. From the fanfare to the first kiss and star-studded guest-list; see all the best moments from Harry & Meghan's historic wedding day. With footage from inside the St. George's chapel we bring to you the moments from the very heart of the royal wedding coverage.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Revelations
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan’s decision to leave royal life behind was far and away from the stiff upper lip announcements of the past. This was a royal family feud that had gone completely out of control. This is the other side of the Sussex’s story from alleged sources close to the couple and recently disclosed accounts.

programme.title: Sweet Micky For President
programme.desc: Music and politics collide when Pras Michel of Fugees returns to his homeland of Haiti to mobilize a presidential campaign for a controversial local musician: Michel Martelly aka Sweet Micky. When Pras's former bandmate, superstar Wyclef Jean, also enters the presidential race the election gains international notoriety attracting the likes of Bill Clinton, Sean Penn and Ben Stiller.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Prince
programme.desc: The world mourned the loss of one of it’s most innovative performers in April 2016. While Prince’s official autopsy confirmed that the singer died from an overdose of the painkiller fentanyl, investigators have still been looking to clear up some additional mysteries surrounding the case. We take a look into the last 24 hours of his death and look for the real answers as to what happened.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: John Lennon
programme.desc: On the morning of December 8, 1980 John Lennon was happy in New York and looking forward to the future. Having just turned 40 he had finally recovered from the years as a Beatle. But by the end of that day John would be dead and the world would be in mourning. Here are the final 24 hours of the ex-Beatle’s life before he was so senselessly murdered by Mark David Chapman."

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Amy Winehouse
programme.desc: After a very public battle with addiction the world was saddened to hear the shocking news that Amy Winehouse was found dead in her bedroom at the young age of 27. We investigate what really happened during the final 24 hours of the singer’s life, with exclusive interviews and testimonials.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Michael Jackson
programme.desc: The ultimate king of pop Michael Jackson spent his last hours battling insomnia and pleading with his personal physician to give him a powerful anesthetic to combat his chronic sleeplessness according to a search-warrant affidavit. We explore the truth behind this and discover the real facts, with exclusive footage and testimonials.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Meeting
programme.desc: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle, Duke and Duchess of Sussex, are the modern-day fairytale we deserve. From the first whispers of a possible romance between the former Suits actress and former bad-boy of Kensington Palace to a wedding straight out of a Disney cartoon, the royal power couple has captured hearts across the globe.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Wedding
programme.desc: It hasn’t been all unicorns and rainbows for Harry and Meghan. The wedded couple have weathered so many storms and media scandals that you’d think they’ve been married for a decade, not a few short years. Through it all, Meghan has been the picture of grace and poise. And Harry has pushed back against every royal protocol set in stone to defend and support his wife.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Goodbye
programme.desc: The decision was clear - duty or love? Will their decision to start a new life in America distance them in more than just miles from Harry's royal family Their new life in Hollywood has changed the course of royal history forever.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
programme.desc: From Diana’s first steps into the royal world to the birth of her two sons and heirs, this documentary tells the story of Diana's early years.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part II: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: The marriage of Prince Charles and Princess Diana remains infamous for being one of the most turbulent royal weddings in modern history. As the cracks began to form the world watched. What should have been the fairytale couple could not hold any longer. Discover the truth of what really lead to the split, as the world behind palace gates is uncovered.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part III: Legacy Of Love
programme.desc: A late night phone call from Paris brought news that would rock the world. The sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana devastated millions. Hear what it was really like to be at the eye of the storm, as Diana's closest friend and confidant shares his story of heartbreak and farewell.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honour, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire.

programme.title: Selena Gomez: Devotion
programme.desc: After returning from her 5 year break from music, Selena Gomez has blown the world away with her 3rd studio album Rare. She has transformed over the years, from Disney pop star to award winning film and tv producer. She is one of the biggest stars in Hollywood and is certain one of the most devoted to her art.

programme.title: The Barbie Story
programme.desc: A documentary about the origins of Barbie and her worldwide impact.

programme.title: The Tongfather
programme.desc: The violent tale of an undercover agent's mission to topple a Chinese opium ring that is masterminded by a ruthless kingpin known only as "The TongFather." Great old school Kung Fu film directed and starring Roc Tien.

programme.title: Crane Fighter
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl (Judy Lee) secretly learns the deadly art of the Crane technique against the wishes of her father, himself a former Shaolin man. Soon, she becomes an expert and has a run-in with local Manchu lackeys who are on the warpath for all Shaolin students. Enter the debonair Raymond Lui, who teams up with Judy, and together they defeat the evil Manchu warlord Kao Chin Chun.

programme.title: Mission for the Dragon
programme.desc: Dragon Lee and Carter Wong, team up in this excellent offering from Korea. Two sons swear to avenge their father's murder. They set off in search of the last man to see him alive. Climatic fighting ensues.

programme.title: Golden Belt
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge on his enemy who kidnapped and raised his child many years ago.

programme.title: The Tongfather
programme.desc: The violent tale of an undercover agent's mission to topple a Chinese opium ring that is masterminded by a ruthless kingpin known only as "The TongFather." Great old school Kung Fu film directed and starring Roc Tien.

programme.title: Crane Fighter
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl (Judy Lee) secretly learns the deadly art of the Crane technique against the wishes of her father, himself a former Shaolin man. Soon, she becomes an expert and has a run-in with local Manchu lackeys who are on the warpath for all Shaolin students. Enter the debonair Raymond Lui, who teams up with Judy, and together they defeat the evil Manchu warlord Kao Chin Chun.

programme.title: Mission for the Dragon
programme.desc: Dragon Lee and Carter Wong, team up in this excellent offering from Korea. Two sons swear to avenge their father's murder. They set off in search of the last man to see him alive. Climatic fighting ensues.

programme.title: Golden Belt
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge on his enemy who kidnapped and raised his child many years ago.

programme.title: The Tongfather
programme.desc: The violent tale of an undercover agent's mission to topple a Chinese opium ring that is masterminded by a ruthless kingpin known only as "The TongFather." Great old school Kung Fu film directed and starring Roc Tien.

programme.title: Stranger from Canton
programme.desc: Extremely popular kung fu film, set during the early 1900’s during the last years of the Qing dynasty and the rise of Sun Yat-Sen. Loyalists to Sun are gathering, and Qing officials are hunting them down and brutally executing them. Jing Fong (Jason Pai-Piao) arrives from the US and is surprised at the injustices he sees. He’s later framed by the henchmen of Qing lord (Thompson Kao Kang) for murder, but joins forces with local martial arts master Wong Yee (Tony Liu) to take down the Qing officials.

programme.title: Guy With Secret Kung Fu
programme.desc: Dead Eye and his gang are terrorizing a small Chinese region. Chan Ling and his group of misfit friends take it upon themselves to stop evildoers by learning the Super Kung Fu style. Luckily for them, a mysterious stranger is also after Dead Eye. Brilliant action from the Mystery of Chess Boxing posse.

programme.title: Duel at the Forest
programme.desc: Passion and the agony of injustice boil over into an unshakeable resolve, as Pan Lung returns home after five years in prison for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Bruce Kung Fu Girls
programme.desc: Five pretty girls go to Hong Kong to stay with their uncle, who is a police superintendent. Soon they run into a gang of thieves, which gives them a chance to put their excellent kung fu skills to good use. This Bod Squad will kick your ass!

programme.title: Heart of Wilderness
programme.desc: On the run in the wilderness, Travis and Aimee navigate icy waters and the secrets they keep.

programme.title: The Hardest Thing
programme.desc: The heart-wrenching path of two young couples in their transition from adolescence to adulthood and the trials and tribulations that come with it.

programme.title: About an Age
programme.desc: It's Friday night and five friends on the cusp of adulthood gather at a house to celebrate the end of another school week.

programme.title: Wedding Swingers
programme.desc: A TV producer invites his old college friends to a destination wedding.

programme.title: Bad People
programme.desc: A quirky & smart dark comedy, bursting with s*x, violence, dirty politics & fame whores, BAD PEOPLE is a hilarious tale that reminds us that we all have a dark side!

programme.title: Color Me You
programme.desc: A young woman's family pressures her to attend law school and join their practice, but she continues to follow her dream to become a painter.

programme.title: Convict
programme.desc: Sent to prison because of manslaughter, Ray is challenged both physically and mentally by a sadistic prison boss.

programme.title: Dead On Arrival
programme.desc: A pharmaceutical sales rep visits a small town in Louisiana on business. He finds himself in a dark world of corruption and murder with 24 hours to live, running from the police, the mob and a sheriff that wants him dead.

programme.title: Elle: A Modern Cinderella Tale
programme.desc: Elle (Ashlee Hewitt) is a girl who wants to be a singer and lives with her uncle, the owner of a small independent record label, after her parents died.

programme.title: Survive or Die
programme.desc: A young refugee girl escaping civil war wrongly lands in a remote uninhabited part of Australia. She must reach civilization whilst fighting starvation, harsh terrain and a hunter who hunts her in vengeance for the death of his son.

programme.title: Sam
programme.desc: An alpha New York City male is magically transformed into a beautiful girl, falls in love, and learns what it means to be a woman.

programme.title: Twice
programme.desc: A mystery girl arrives in a small town in Brattleboro Vermont and creates a new life for herself while her past remains unknown.

programme.title: All About Eva
programme.desc: Eva, a resilient and alluring young woman jockey, infiltrates the stables of Pope Healy, a wealthy racing magnate.

programme.title: The Dog Walker
programme.desc: A psychotic stalker forces a retired investigative journalist to solve a terrifying puzzle.

programme.title: CainAbel
programme.desc: There is good and evil in every family. A generation that commits the ultimate sacrifices to protect their family from destruction can curse and doom present and future generations.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The BMW 3 Series is the epitome of a sports saloon. Since its debut in 1975, it has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. It's a family saloon, a sports car, a tuning object and a racing car.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: Frank Slopianka, a US car dealer from Berlin, takes about eleven seconds to finish the quarter mile race at the drag racing event Race@Airport with his 700-hp Camaro. And: the tuning company Mansory promises even more power for Lamborghini cars.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: The Nürburgring is the most dangerous, yet the most beautiful race track in the world and meeting point for racing icons and car rarities. The annual Sport1 Track Day lures thousands of petrol heads to the iconic track.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: Ola Stenegard, Head of Vehicle Design at BMW Motorrad, meets world-famous motorcycle customizers in Los Angeles. Also: we present the craziest 'homemade supercars' such as the Fahrradi Farfalla FFX, the slowest sports car in the world.

programme.title: Lancia Stratos HF
programme.desc: The Lancia Stratos with Ferrari power, the rally icon of the 1970s.

programme.title: BMW M6 Gran Coupe
programme.desc: The M6 Gran Coupe is the latest creation from BMW's M-works subdivision. The Bavarians show that driving this V8 powered car almost feels like flying, even with the whole family on board.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Once again it was time for the VLN Endurance Racing Championship. While the drivers were doing their test laps, we had a look behind the scenes and explored what went on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: We present the highlights of last week. The 24 hour race was exciting, as usual. In addition, we explored the 'Strong Man Run' and took a look at the tourist drivers

programme.title: BMW 503
programme.desc: The noble four-seater 503 convertible was one of BMWs most exclusive models in the 1950s. Many international sports and movie stars and other wealthy customers were fond of this sporty luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Volvo S90
programme.desc: It looks sportier than one might expect from the Swedes. The taillights frame the powerful looking rear. On the inside, the Volvo S90 impresses with the finest materials and soft nappa leather.

programme.title: Alfa Romeo 6C 2500SS
programme.desc: Founded in 1910, the iconic Italian car manufacturer Alfa Romeo experienced a very eventful history. Their 6C 2500 SS model is right in the middle of the company's more than 100-year history. It combined new technology with an early post-war appearance.

programme.title: Offroad & Fun, Part 5
programme.desc: Offroad & Fun are a thrilling TV specials that take viewers on an adrenaline-fueled journey through the world of extreme motorsports.

programme.title: Offroad & Fun, Part 5
programme.desc: Offroad & Fun are a thrilling TV specials that take viewers on an adrenaline-fueled journey through the world of extreme motorsports.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are still at the ski resort, preparing a spectacular stunt involving a station wagon that is catapulted 50 meters high into the air. The high-flying car is supposed to crash into another car that is placed on a meadow.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode features the most spectacular classic body stunts: jumping from rooftops or the top of a driving cars, falling down staircases, and other potentially bone-breaking daredevilry, including fails and outtakes.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes - there are thousands of ways to destroy cars, and the Stunt Heroes produce a lot of wrecks over the course of their adrenaline-filled job. It's a look back at the car stunt highlights of the past episodes.

programme.title: BMW F 800 R
programme.desc: BMW F 800 R is a robust roadster with a lot of spirit, and even motorcycle world champions count on its agility. World champion, Chris Pfeiffer is showing just how much fun you can have with a BMW F 800 R. His work motorcycle is based on the version that you can buy.

programme.title: Ken Block - Gymkhana Grid
programme.desc: Spectacular drifts are to be expected when Ken Block visits the Gymkhana Grid.

programme.title: Ken Block at the Monza Rallye Show
programme.desc: In Monza, Ken Block is set to compete against Allstars from motorsport at the Monza Rally Show.

programme.title: Bentley Mulsanne EWB
programme.desc: The long version of the Bentley Mulsanne is a prime example of a chauffeured limousine. With it, the British luxury car brand has set the bar extremely high when it comes to automotive comfort.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Slippery or muddy roads and bad visibility are circumstances that often spoil driving pleasure in winter. We took two almost identical Porsche 911's to an icy test track. Also: drifting fun in the snow with the Suzuki SX4 S-Cross.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: 4-door coupes combine the best of two worlds, the performance of a coupe and the style of a limousine. We took a closer look at three examples of this car subspecies, the Audi A7, BMW's 4 Series Gran Coupe, and the Mercedes-Benz CLA models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The top-of-the-line specimens of a car model range are built for pure driving pleasure. We put the VW Golf R, the Audi TTS and the BMW M 235i to the test in order to see if they are worthy of bearing the crown of their model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The search for the fastest, best looking and best sounding car continues. Once more car lovers from the Middle East bring their tuned vehicles to the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach and have it judged by Saif Hattawi. The winner receives a special treat for two people from the luxurious Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette try to win the competition.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Put Your Car on TV gives every car owner the chance to bring their tuned machines to the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah beach. There, Saif Hattawi will assess each car based on speed, style and sound. The person with the most amazing car wins a one night stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. A BMW X6M, a massive Ford F250 and a special Nissan Patrol try to win this prize.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The Walk' at JBR, the most prestigious location in Dubai, sets the background for the fastest customized cars in the Middle East. Put Your Car on TV invites car owners to present their cars and have it judged. The owner of the fastest, most beautiful and best sounding car wins a special treat from Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the competitors are a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Once more, Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi are on the hunst for the most amazing cars in the world and ask car owners to bring their customized vehicles to Dubai, where it will be awarded points based on speed, style and sound. The car with the points wins a stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. Among the presented cars are a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car on TV people from the Middle East present their tuned vehicles. They are rewarded with points based on its styling, the highest (possible) speed ever driven und naturally also its sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a luxurious treat from the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. This time, a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C are put on the spotlight.

programme.title: Mercedes-AMG GT S Performmaster
programme.desc: Not far from Stuttgart is the home of the tuner Performmaster who specialize in the performance optimization of Mercedes-AMG models. They turned the already more-than-potent GT S sports car into a beast.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. The car's power and performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough. Their challenge was to improve something that was already great.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a race driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical has the perfect solution for you. The company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is an extremely aggressive and agile racer. And the best thing about it is that it's street legal, but doesn´t feel like that at all.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, at these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? - You come up with the GT3. - The Porsche 911 GT3 with its 475 hp engine is the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And the German brand's RS model is even more intense when it comes to power, performance and ultimate sports car feel.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992. Even manufacturers like Ferrari can’t avoid some downsizing once in a while, given this exclusive but highly competitive market segment.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc: Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy). - Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: AKC.tv
programme.desc: AKC.TV is the digital network for all things DOG! AKC.TV, powered by the American Kennel Club, brings over 135 years of dog expertise to dog lovers the world over. Featuring dog related programming 24/7, as well as an on-demand library of world class dog events, training and health tips for you and your pup, and original series created especially for you and your best friend.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: A young doctor (David Alpert) faces a moral dilemma when asked to treat the escaped convict (Gregg Barton) who killed his father (Stanley Andrews).

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: An injured rancher summons all his strength to help Annie and Lofty when outlaws hold his wife hostage.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A Tuscarawas brave tries to start a war between his people and the white men.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
programme.desc: A young woman with a past and a Seneca Chief attempt to stir the Iroquois into war with the settlers.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben gives farmland on the Ponderosa to an outcast Indian (Ricardo Montalban) who saved his life; guest Madlyn Rhue.

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: A writer (Dale Evans) of cowboy novels saves herself and a border agent (Roy Rogers) with a trick from her latest book.

programme.title: Texas, Brooklyn and Heaven
programme.desc: A would-be playwright (Guy Madison) and a runaway (Diana Lynn) leave Texas and fall in love in New York.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: A gunslinger a dance-hall girl and drifters enter Indian country.

programme.title: Northwest Trail
programme.desc: A Mountie (Bob Steele) escorts a young woman bringing cash to her father in the wild.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: A man is falsely imprisoned on a murder charge, then escapes to join an outlaw gang and unmask the real killer.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Jeb Stuart and George Custer get stationed at Fort Leavenworth in Kansas and work together to stop abolitionist John Brown.

programme.title: Ghost Town Gold
programme.desc: The Three Mesquiteers set out to trap outlaws who have robbed a bank and stashed the loot in an abandoned village.

programme.title: Doomed Caravan
programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy rides shotgun for a freight company and comes up against a gang of outlaws posing as cavalrymen.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade
programme.desc: A man (John Carpenter) takes over a ranch left by his outlaw father.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: A saloon singer (Ann Dvorak) and her rival like a marshal (Randolph Scott) who cleans up a drunken sheriff's (Edgar Buchanan) cow town.

programme.title: Ride, Ryder, Ride!
programme.desc: In their first cinematic outing, Red Ryder and his Indian sidekick help a newspaper publisher clean up her town.

programme.title: Raiders of the Border
programme.desc: U.S. marshals (Johnny Mack Brown, Raymond Hatton) catch rustlers swapping cattle for Mexican jewels.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: A mayor erects a toll-gate on federal land to keep out riff-raff and raise money for the town.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate tries to restore the self confidence of Floyd Smoot after he is jilted by his mail-order sweetheart, by pretending to be in love with him.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe decides to go into the cologne business.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: A phony sheriff is part of a rustling scheme.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cisco and Pancho discover the shady motives of a lawyer hired to change a rancher's will.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Harry Tracy terrorized America's northwest at the end of the 19th century; Matt and a posse have corner the outlaw.

programme.title: Stories of the Century
programme.desc: Matt and Frankie follow Butch Cassidy to South America.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: Judge Roy along with Taggart are intrigued by the arrival of Pat O'Hara and much younger wife Kate; Pat's fondess for drink and gambling has him involved with the town's rowdies.

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: Deputy Jeff Taggart is framed in the murder of a horse trader.

programme.title: Ramon the Mexican
programme.desc: Ramon avenges his brother's murder and kills the Baxter Family.

programme.title: Tell Them Willie Boy Is Here
programme.desc: In 1909, when young Paiute Indian Willie Boy returns to his California reservation to be with Lola, whose father disapproves of him, a killing in self defense takes place, triggering a massive man hunt for Willie.

programme.title: Joshua The Black Rider
programme.desc: A black soldier returns from fighting for the Union in the Civil War only to find out that his mother has been murdered by a gang of white thugs.

programme.title: Guns Of The Revolution
programme.desc: In Mexico, a mad general is leading his own war against the Church.

programme.title: Four Gunmen of the Holy Trinity
programme.desc: Arms trafficking with the Indians on the one hand and acquiring documents concerning the ownership of a goldmine on the other are the principal interests of Quin and Gomez, the highly suspicious guests at Papa Martinez' inn.

programme.title: Life is Tough, Eh Providence
programme.desc: An eccentric bounty hunter named Providence captures and sets free a criminal in order to collect the same bounty over and over again in different states, until they discover that a local sheriff is up to something crooked.

programme.title: Requiem for a Gringo
programme.desc: A unique Euro-western with the hero as an astrologist who wears a leopard suit.

programme.title: They Call Him Cemetery
programme.desc: John and George McIntire are a couple of naive brothers who travel to a lawless western town to see their father.

programme.title: The Kid From Texas
programme.desc: In New Mexico, Billy the Kid is involved in the Lincoln County War, kills many rivals and eventually becomes a wanted fugitive.

programme.title: The Ballad of a Gunfighter
programme.desc: An outlaw and his partner feud over the same woman.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Bart Allison and sidekick Sam arrive in the town of Sundown on the wedding day of town boss Tate Kimbrough, whom Allison blames for his wife's death years earlier.

programme.title: Fort Courageous
programme.desc: An ex-cavalry sergeant, being escorted to prison after being convicted of a crime he didn't commit, finds himself leading the remnants of a unit that has been under Indian attack at a fort. The commanding officer has been killed, the Indians vastly outnumber them, and the only bargaining chip they have is the fact that they have captured the Indian chief's son.

programme.title: Lightning Jack
programme.desc: Lightning Jack Kane is an Australian outlaw in the wild west. During a bungled bank robbery he picks up mute Ben Doyle as a hostage. The two become good friends, with Jack teaching Ben how to rob banks, while they plan Jack's last heist.

programme.title: Singing Guns
programme.desc: Notorious stagecoach robber Rhiannon is unintentionally appointed as deputy when he saves the sheriff's life and must wear two hats between his new job that he enjoys and his old occupation that he misses.

programme.title: Murieta!
programme.desc: The story of Joaquin Murrieta, a real life Mexican bandit who terrorized California with his gang of raiders and cutthroats during the first half of the 19th century. Some saw him as a murderous outlaw, others as the Mexican Robin Hood.

programme.desc: There is no pill, no prescription, and no vaccination that can cure the effects of PTS better than connecting with fellow Veterans through shared experiences. Stoked On Fishing and Save The Brave to bring awareness to PTSD (Post Traumatic syndrome). In this special episode, we take a group of veterans fishing on the El Dorado out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We catch giant southern California White Sea Bass, Calico Bass, Sheep's Head, and Yellowtail.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
programme.sub-title: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
programme.desc: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Nantes"
programme.desc: Josh and ultimate traveler Lexie Limitless explore Nantes on a mechanical elephant and inline skates, and discover a deserted mine and a noble house.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Thessaloniki"
programme.desc: Cody goes off the beaten path in Thessaloniki, Greece. He runs over wagons at a train cemetery, explores a factory with drones and dives to a shipwreck.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Ruhr District"
programme.desc: Exploring in the industrial Ruhr District in Germany, Josh discovers abandoned steel and mining factories and experiences a miner’s life underneath the ground.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Mississippi, Alabama & Arkansas"
programme.desc: A hurricane in the south forces Lisa to change direction. We meet southern Van Lifers living under the radar in a state where the lifestyle is judged harshly. Tragically, Lisa’s story takes a heavy turn when she discovers that her father has died.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Texas"
programme.desc: A colourful graffiti artist in Austin shares her story of loss with Lisa and gives her a tarot reading. We travel to rural Texas to overnight with Jupiter: an outspoken, non-binary person of colour, living in their vintage RV while studying law.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Arizona"
programme.desc: Lisa spontaneously joins a sober dance party on a mountain top in Sedona, and meets spiritual Van Lifers who have dramatically changed their entire existence, including former NFL player Joe Hawley, and a transformative breathwork practitioner.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Utah"
programme.desc: Lisa heads to Utah, the ultimate playground for Van Life adrenaline junkies: aka Dirt Bags. Base jumper Derrick shows that by confronting death, it helps us appreciate life. We meet a solo female traveler who challenges Lisa by taking her bouldering.

programme.title: The Classy Chef S1 - "Spiced-Rubbed Seared Sea Bass"
programme.desc: Chef Natasha tantalizes soca artist Nailah Blackman with culinary dream destination by creating a Greek-inspired dish.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "Japan"
programme.desc: Land of the rising sun and the fastest trains in the world that takes us from skateboarding to drag queens and one of the last remaining old-world jazz bars. We meet a chalk artist and a sculpture who makes art with a bite, aka: real teeth.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "Hong Kong"
programme.desc: Whether street art and tofu or Bruce Lee and the Star Ferry, Hong Kong is a City overflowing with art and history. Stephen learns about the secrets from the locals and the expats.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "East Timor"
programme.desc: Dave Reyne explores the capitol of East Timor’s Dili, and Alana enjoy a serenade on the river

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Bangkok"
programme.desc: Alana finds a unique way to explore Budapest and Scotty enjoys a food crawl through Bangkok.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Mad Max museum"
programme.desc: Scotty visits the Mad Max museum in Silverton and David treks to one of Indonesia's spectacular sleeping giants

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Komodo dragon"
programme.desc: David gets close but not too close to the Komodo dragon and I try out a local delicacy.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Tbilisi"
programme.desc: Cody discovers the unknown beauty of Tbilisi exploring abandoned Cold War bomb shelters, a derelict weather station and an abandoned cable car station.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Nantes"
programme.desc: Josh and ultimate traveler Lexie Limitless explore Nantes on a mechanical elephant and inline skates, and discover a deserted mine and a noble house.

programme.desc: Cody goes off the beaten path in Thessaloniki, Greece. He runs over wagons at a train cemetery, explores a factory with drones and dives to a shipwreck.

programme.desc: Exploring in the industrial Ruhr District in Germany, Josh discovers abandoned steel and mining factories and experiences a miner’s life underneath the ground.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Texas"

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Utah"

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "South Korea"
programme.desc: Explore a place where its illegal to be a tattoo artist and the people in a rapidly changing culture. A place where a GPS limitations mean the possibilities to get lost in music and art are endless.

programme.title: The Classy Chef S1 - "Spiced-Rubbed Seared Sea Bass"
programme.desc: Chef Natasha tantalizes soca artist Nailah Blackman with culinary dream destination by creating a Greek-inspired dish.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "From Roadrunner to Superbird"
programme.desc: Redstreak tires are put on the RoadRunner. The winchester gray ‘Cuda is finished and Mark is confronted by Human Resources.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Roaming the Restorations"
programme.desc: Will and Mark argue over color tints. Alyssa helps out in the shop and Goldberg’s GTX goes on a road trip.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T"
programme.desc: Alyssa and Dave restore the RoadRunner’s heaterbox. Buck checks in on his Challenger and Will and Mike play a prank on Mark.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible"
programme.sub-title: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible
programme.desc: Will paints the Phantom ‘Cuda. Royal and Mark take a walk down memory lane and Alyssa test drives Goldberg’s GTX.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Los Angeles"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels’ Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Close Proximity S1 - "Irwindale California"
programme.desc: After a win in Texas, Matt Field and his team head to Irwindale, California with renewed hope and in high spirits.

programme.title: Close Proximity S1 - "Long Beach California"
programme.desc: Matt Field and his and his solid team of experts head down to Long Beach, California to begin the Formula Drift Championship series.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "To Hell and Back"
programme.desc: Last year's champion, Erik Miller defends his title. While 2nd place finisher, Jason Scherer, will be one of the many top challengers aiming to beat him.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills. Bob Ross creates a scene using soft, brilliant colors.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this Bob Ross scene that includes luxurious green foliage and an old weathered trestle-bridge placed lovingly amongst all the beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the sounds of quiet waters, velvety green shrubs and distance foothills. Bob Ross creates a perfect scene of relaxation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this dark breathtaking scene, Bob Ross creates an almost calm night with waves crashing against rocks and protective lighthouse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Journey into the country with Bob Ross and watch how he creates this magnificent painting by adding a large old mill into the heart of the forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden red glow, complete with cowboy restin’ a while by the cracklin’ flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful clouds, rolling hills and winding river waters -- Bob Ross creates this masterpiece using only his special painting knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With brush in hand, Bob Ross leads you on a summertime nature walk, as you uncover the beauty of leafy trees and pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Using a different technique or two, Bob Ross creates a fascinating scene – watch the sun drop below the horizon, just behind the shadow of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: To capture the innocence of a stream-side cottage, Bob Ross creates a giant mountain standing majestically in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross helps a timid little stream find its way to a delightful waterfall, while gazing upon a forest of elegant trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an expansive barn appearing half-covered in a snowy setting of frost bitten foliage and sun-kissed sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It’s almost fall, and Bob Ross captures the undaunted power and charm of a mighty brown mountain surveying its rustic surroundings.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees – all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: USA Through Film Full Stitch_16x9_FC
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city’s heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There’s this ‘all senses on overload’ side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.sub-title: Tackling Snow, Sand, & Cold in Southern Utah

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason experiences insecurity about challenges that the couple are, quite literally, dropped into. From falling out of the sky to a rappel into a dark cave, will the couple be able to work together or will they end up stranded in the dark?

programme.desc: Join pilot Ariel Tweto as she flies to unexpected places along the trails and wild spaces of America, meeting trailblazers in science, history, and exploration along the way.

programme.title: Epic Southern Road Trip
programme.desc: The next stop on Sorted Food's Epic Southern Road Trip is Savannah, Georgia. In 48 hours they must learn all they can about local culture and cuisine before hosting a dinner party for local chefs to showcase what they’ve learned about Southern food and hospitality. Will the guys be able to learn enough in such a short period of time?

programme.title: Epic Southern Road Trip
programme.desc: After exploring Savannah, Georgia for 48 hours learning the ropes of Southern food and hospitality, Chef Ben, Jamie and Mike try hosting a dinner party for local chefs, food writers and Savannah natives. How will these expectant locals react?

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe explores incredible and unexpected colors around the USA. He visits spectacular red rock formations in Sedona, Arizona; walks on red, black and green beaches in Hawaii; and discovers hot springs that produce brilliant colors due to heat-loving micro-organisms in Yellowstone National Park.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe visits the Mojave Desert and discovers its diversity; travels to Death Valley, the hottest spot in North America; and explores Joshua Tree National Park, home of the unusual Joshua tree and other exotic plants.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson explores the adventurous side of St. Petersburg Clearwater, Florida; Charleston, South Carolina; and Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: City with Bite
programme.desc: Follow foodie fanatic Nomarama as he hits the streets of Norfolk, VA to uncover the stories, the characters, and the food that gives the city its bite.

programme.title: USA Through Food
programme.desc: A journey through the USA, through the diverse food scenes of six vibrant cities.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh discover Appalachian Mountain Music and clogging in the Blue Ridge mountains of Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Dylan explores the world of Hatch chilis and meets the farmers and community in this New Mexico valley known for bringing these unique peppers to life - one tingly, tasty, spicy bite at a time.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: We learn the kite ballet and soar to new heights at the annual kite-festival in the blustery sea-side town of Morro Bay.

programme.title: Notes from the USA
programme.desc: Foy explores Oregon's capital, Portland, a city renowned for its sustainability efforts, and its unique take on art, food, and live music.

programme.title: Notes from the USA
programme.desc: After an earthquake hit San Francisco in 1906, artists were called to populate the Californian coast, transforming it into an artistic mecca for those who like to surf.

programme.title: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
programme.desc: The Sorted guys make it to North Central Texas and take on a round of foodie challenges in the "Big D".

programme.title: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
programme.desc: Continuing their culinary adventure in North Central Texas, the guys take on challenges just west of Dallas in Fort Worth.

programme.title: Sorted Food Goes Big in Texas
programme.desc: Chef Ben and the guys explore Austin, the final city in their Texan adventure.

programme.title: Conflict of Interest
programme.desc: Gabrielle Winters is a successful Deputy Attorney, married to an adoring husband and mother to a beautiful college age daughter (Asia). Yet, underneath this picture perfect life, Gabrielle is haunted by a ghost of her past. Her life unravels when she prosecutes Donte, a man who could possibly be the son she gave up for adoption when she was 17. Matters only get more complicated once Donte sets his eyes on Gabrielle’s daughter. Can Gabrielle maintain this heavy secret and protect her family?

programme.title: Caught in a Trapp
programme.desc: The story of a young teen who was abused by his father. Following the tragic death of his parents, he grew up on the streets and is forced into a life of running from D Slug, a known drug lord, after selling drugs from his opps!

programme.title: Blood and Money
programme.desc: Four cousins from a tight-knit family are thrust into a world of chaos when the youngest is suspected of stealing money from one of Memphis' most dangerous drug dealers. With their lives on the line, they must figure out how to make sixty thousand dollars in two weeks, all while plotting their revenge. When one of them falls for the mark, things get more complicated.

programme.title: The Wake Up Call
programme.desc: Stefan Malone, a gifted student in science and math, is crushed when he finds out about his mother’s cancer diagnosis. He dedicates his life and research to finding a cure at Emerson, but will his dedication and determination consume him?

programme.title: Working in the Dark
programme.desc: Kim is an aspiring model, working towards her dream of launching her career. A tragic death changes everything and forces Kim to try unconditional methods in dark places to land on a prestigious magazine cover.

programme.title: Have You Seen My Man?
programme.desc: After a long night of partying, Niecey's man Chase is nowhere to be found. Just when things couldn’t get any worse, here comes the exes and their drama. The tables turn and the finger pointing begins, Niecy knows there's no turning back now, she has to find the truth and her man.

programme.title: She Time
programme.desc: Krystal, a devoted wife and mother, finds herself trapped in the routine of a her daily life and a fading marriage. Longing for excitement and passion, she embarks on a girls’ night out that unexpectedly reignites an old flame from her past.

programme.title: Dope Boy Magic
programme.desc: In the rough streets of Lumberton, NC, Mario wants to take the fastest path possible to a better life. Growing up with a father who was a pimp and a mother who was a prostitute, he only saw the worst in humanity on a nightly basis. Failing out of school and penniless, the only options were selling drugs, and theft. He started out breaking and entering, robbing trailer homes of known dope boys, who take notice and action.

programme.title: Eyes From Eden
programme.desc: A drummer sacrifices the integrity of his faith to satisfy his unfulfilled desires once he meets an exotic woman named Eden.

programme.title: Faces of Deceit
programme.desc: Akira Santiago suffers from short-term memory loss. She spends almost two years of her life trying to figure out what happened in her past. What she finds out will change her forever.

programme.title: Fair Play
programme.desc: Sisters, Freedom and Sasha, learn that when it comes to love, everything has a price...that's just FAIR PLAY.

programme.title: Finding Boaz
programme.desc: Church administrator, Torrey, attempts to put the pieces of her life together after a failed engagement. With fears of becoming a lonely cat lady, Torrey solicits the help of her worldly cousin Nell who puts Torrey in a How to Catch a Man School. Class includes, makeovers, shopping sprees, club hopping and tactics of deceit to help Torrey find the man of her dreams. Within the twists and turns of How to Catch a Man School, Torrey catches far more than she bargained for!

programme.title: Get Da Big Bag
programme.desc: Good things come to those who get the bag, but it comes with a steep price.

programme.title: Guns Down
programme.desc: Ten criminals are invited to the estate of one of the most major drug lords in the US for the chance to win $5 million dollars and leave the drug game. However, the game could risk their lives and everything they built.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: African savannah regions support a much greater diversity of wildlife than temperate grasslands.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: Underwater creatures must make homes in the deep wherever survival can be assured.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: The desert is an extreme environment where wildlife must adapt to survive. Many animals are nocturnal.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: Rainforests are known as the lungs of our planet. And the Amazon rainforest is the heart of Brazil.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: The masters of the sky are the winged predators of the aerial world. They have evolved as master predators.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: The Arctic is alive with a fascinating assortment of wildlife species, hardy breeds uniquely suited to cold.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: This episode explores the wildlife of American prairies and grasslands that spread all across North America.

programme.title: World of the Wild
programme.desc: Asia is home to some of the most beautiful rainforests, jungles, and wildlife. Sadly, they are threatened.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.sub-title: High Up in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: There is so much to discover in the Swiss Jura mountains. It's is a natural landscape with many facets.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.sub-title: Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains
programme.desc: The Jura region in the Swiss Romandy has a surprisingly diverse natural landscape.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.desc: Great crested grebes and lizards are evidence of just how wild nature can be at Lake Maggiore.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.desc: Ticino, an area of Northern Italy, has an immensely varied natural landscape.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.desc: Ibex, marmots, and common vipers all have different strategies for surviving winter's icy grip.

programme.title: Fascinating Places
programme.desc: Explore the Aare, the longest river whose entire course lies within Switzerland.

programme.desc: Nature in the Bernese Oberland is marked by pretty alpine meadows with colorful flowers and rugged rocks.

programme.sub-title: A Summer With Polar Bears at Hudson Bay
